description: A model rocketry club member wants to add an electronics payload bay to their existing simple rocket to carry an altimeter and small camera for a club altitude verification event. Using the open 'simple_model_rocket.ork' design, integrate a new body tube (100mm length, 25.4mm outer diameter) containing a 30-gram electronics mass component. The final design must maintain a stability margin of at least 1.0 caliber. Save the modified design to '~/Documents/rockets/payload_integrated_rocket.ork'. Document the added components, payload mass (grams), final stability margin (calibers), and simulated apogee altitude (meters) in a report at '~/Documents/exports/payload_report.txt'.
